prompt: I want to set up dynamic PostgreSQL credentials with Infisical so each developer gets their own short-lived database user instead of sharing a static password. Our Postgres instance is in a private VPC on AWS. Walk me through the setup.
assertions: Mentions need for pre-existing PostgreSQL admin user with CREATE ROLE/GRANT privileges
Correctly identifies Gateway requirement for private VPC access
Shows correct config fields (host, port, user, password, database name, TTL settings)
Mentions customizable SQL creation statements for least-privilege access
